ValidationRule.description: Cannot Add Contract Assignments if Unauthorized Profile
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( $Profile.Name <> 'System Administrator', $Profile.Name <> 'SA3', $Profile.Name <> 'Supervisory', $Profile.Name <> 'Ops Manager -Rig', $Profile.Name <> 'WD - Finance', $Profile.Name <> 'Ops Manager -Rig (New)', $Profile.Name <> 'Ops Supervisor', $Profile.Name <> 'Supervisory 2.0' )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You are not authorized to add/edit Contract Assignments. Kindly, contact your Operations Manager for same.
